changes: Added rule #6 requiring bold headers, currency format '$#,##0', and column widths of 15 as mandatory formatting
Added a 'Reading/Analyzing XLSX Files' section with openpyxl read + JSON output pattern for the xlsx-analyze task
Rewrote the worked example to include currency formatting, column widths, and dynamic last_data_row calculation
Added explicit warning against applying red fill to formula cells (only numeric data cells)
Removed bundled template script reference (scripts/create_xlsx.py) to simplify — inline example is sufficient
Removed unused files: scripts/create_xlsx.py, recalc.py, LICENSE.txt
